title: Bela` #1106
definition:
Bela = "destruction"

 n pr m
 1) a king of Edom
 2) first son of Benjamin
 3) a son of Ahaz, a Reubenite

 n pr loc
 4) one of the five cities of the plain which was spared at the
    intercession of Lot, and received the name of Zoar
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
 1) a king of Edom
 2) first son of Benjamin

    NASB:  an Edomite, also two Isr.
